messages.content: You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
List the AV1 decoder pipeline stages end-to-end.

Parse OBUs → frame header parse → reference frame setup → tile group parsing → entropy decode of symbols → inverse quant/transform → intra/inter prediction (subpel/warp) → compound/OBMC → deblocking → CDEF → loop restoration (Wiener/SGR) → super-res (if any) → film grain (optional) → output/reorder.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Superblock partitioning impact on decoding.

Sequence header selects 64×64 or 128×128 SB. Partitions drive entropy contexts, transform bounds, edge availability, and loop-filter boundaries; decoder walks the partition tree to allocate mode info and neighbors.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Intra prediction families and behavior.

DC, Smooth/Planar, Directional (angle set), Paeth, Filter‑Intra. Directional uses filtered references along quantized angles; Smooth fits gradient; DC averages; Paeth uses linear predictor with occlusion check; Filter‑Intra applies template filters.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Inter prediction reference model.
Blocks pick single/compound refs from DPB slots (LAST..ALT2). Motion vectors at 1/4‑pel luma with 8‑tap luma and 4‑tap chroma filters; optional warped/global motion per ref.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Subpel luma interpolation pseudocode.
tmp[x,y]=∑_{k=-3..4}H[k]*src[x+k,y]; dst[x,y]=clip((∑_{k=-3..4}V[k]*tmp[x,y+k]+round)>>shift). Coeff tables chosen by fractional offsets.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
OBMC purpose.
Blend current inter predictor with neighbors using overlapped windows to reduce seams at block borders.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Global/warped motion summary.
Header signals per‑ref model (identity/translation/affine/projective). For blocks opting in, map (x,y) through model and sample with subpel filters; clip coordinates.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Transform types and sizes.
2D transforms = row×col from {DCT, ADST, FLIPADST, IDTX}. Inter up to 64×64, intra typically ≤32×32; asymmetrics allowed. ITX selected per block/tx set.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Inverse quant/transform sketch.
level[i]=qcoeff[i]*dequant(dc/ac)>>dq_shift; inverse scan to (x,y); apply inverse 1D rows then cols per tx_type; round/shift and clamp to bit depth.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Entropy coder characterization.
Context‑adaptive multi‑symbol range/boolean coding; probs reset/updated per frame/tile as allowed. Symbols include partition, modes, coeffs, MVs, etc.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Deblocking inputs and flow.
Base LF levels + ref/mode deltas + segmentation. HEV/flat decisions select tap patterns. Process vertical then horizontal per 4‑px edges; clamp outputs.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
CDEF timing and idea.
After deblock, before LR. Detect dominant direction per 8×8; apply constrained primary/secondary taps to suppress ringing while preserving edges.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Loop restoration overview.
Per plane per restoration unit: Wiener (separable) or SGR‑Proj (guided). Apply after CDEF with stripe overlap; clamp to bit depth.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Super‑resolution position in pipeline.
If enabled, coded width < render width; upsample horizontally after LR and before film grain/output.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Order hints and legality check.
Use N‑bit modular order hints; reject refs where diff_mod(N, ref, cur) < 0 to avoid future references.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Top‑level OBU types relevant to decoding.
sequence_header, temporal_delimiter, frame_header (or frame), tile_group, metadata (e.g., film grain), padding.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Frame decode entry flow.
(optional) temporal_delimiter → maybe new sequence_header → frame_header. If show_existing_frame: output and stop. Else parse all tile_group OBUs → reconstruct → run in‑loop tools.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Frame header major sections (decode order).

frame_type/show flags → frame_id (if enabled) → frame_size/superres → render_size → reference mapping (primary_ref_frame, refresh flags) → screen/integer MV flags → order_hint → interp/tx settings → quant + deltas → segmentation map/params → delta_q/delta_lf flags → loop_filter → CDEF → LR → tile info → global motion → film grain src → coded_lossless derivation.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Parsing frame_type & show flags interactions.
KEY resets refs; INTRA_ONLY is intra without full reset; INTER uses refs; SWITCH used for structure changes. show_frame displays immediately; show_existing_frame reuses DPB entry and skips tiles.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Frame size derivation logic.

If frame_size_with_refs copies size from a ref: use it. Else if frame_size_override_flag: read explicit width/height; otherwise take from sequence header. Super‑res may reduce coded width; render size may differ.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Super‑res signaling.
Read coded denominator/scale; reconstruction uses coded_width; horizontal upscale later to render/output width.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Reference refresh flags semantics.
refresh_frame_flags bitmask selects DPB slots to overwrite with the reconstructed output and order hint at end of frame.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
primary_ref_frame usage.
Seeds probability contexts/segment defaults from a chosen reference unless error_resilient or unavailable, in which case defaults are used.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Order hint legality check at header time.
For each listed ref index: ensure diff_mod(bits, ref_oh, cur_oh) ≥ 0; otherwise stream error.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Interpolation and motion mode enable flags.
interpolation_filter can be switchable or fixed; header enables/disables OBMC/warp; force_integer_mv forbids fractional sampling for screen content.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Transform signaling mode.
tx_mode selects per‑block transform signaling vs derived; reduced_tx_set limits transform types to a subset for complexity savings.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Quant base and deltas; delta_q presence.
Read base_qindex; chroma DC/AC deltas if present. If delta_q_present=1, later per‑region delta_q adjusts local qindex at block roots.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Segmentation enable/map/update.
segmentation_enabled toggles; segmentation_update_map and segmentation_temporal_update control map coding; feature data per segment follows when enabled.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
delta_lf header.
If delta_lf_present=1, read resolution and whether deltas are per‑direction/per‑plane; later parsed at block roots.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Loop filter header fields.
loop_filter_level[0..3], sharpness; optional ref/mode delta arrays when enabled.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
CDEF header fields.
cdef_damping, cdef_bits (table size), and that many (luma,chroma) strength entries.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Loop restoration header fields.
Per plane: lr_type (none/wiener/SGR/switchable) and RU size code; per‑frame limits for coeffs/eps; per‑RU params arrive later.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Tile info header.
Uniform tiling uses tile_cols_log2/tile_rows_log2; non‑uniform provides explicit splits. Header may carry context_update_tile_id and per‑tile packet sizes (bytes).

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Global motion header.
Per reference: model type and fixed‑point parameters within range; store matrices for warped mode blocks.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.
Film grain presence locus.
Film grain parameters may be in frame header or metadata OBU; decoder uses one source and ensures grain is not referenced.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: order hint legality check with 3‑bit hints.

Input:
seq.order_hint_bits=3; cur=5; refs=[(idx=LAST,oh=6),(GOLDEN,oh=1),(ALT,oh=3)]
diff_mod(3,6,5)=+1 OK; diff_mod(3,1,5)= (1-5)&7=4; 4 has msb=0 → +4 OK; diff_mod(3,3,5)=(3-5)&7=5; 5 has msb=1 → 5-8=−3 <0 → illegal (future). Drop ALT.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: frame size derived from reference vs explicit.

Input:
frame_size_with_refs=1, use_ref=LAST with size 1920×1080; enable_superres=1, coded_denom=8 (scale=7/8).
Coded frame size= (1920*7/8)×1080 = 1680×1080 (integer per spec rounding). Render size remains 1920×1080 unless overridden.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: delta_q at 8×8 granularity.

Input:
base_q=128; delta_q_present=1; delta_q_res=2 (8×8). Region roots read dq:{+8, 0, −16}.
Region A q=136; Region B q=128; Region C q=112. Child blocks inherit parent q unless they start a new region root.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: loop filter level composition on an inter edge.

Input:
lf_y=32; seg_delta=−4 (segment 3); ref_delta[ref=BWD]=+2; mode_delta[INTRA]=0; edge is inter with BWD and NEARMV.
level = 32 + (−4) + 2 + mode_delta[inter_class_of_NEARMV]. If inter_class delta=−1 → level=29. Clamp to [0..63].

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: distance‑weighted compound weight.

Input:
ref0_oh=20, ref1_oh=12, cur_oh=16, table maps |d0|=|16−20|=4, |d1|=|16−12|=4 to w=32.
out=(32*A + 32*B + 32)>>6 = ((A+B)+1)>>1 (rounded average).

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: subpel offsets from MV.

Input:
MV=(+3,−5) in 1/4‑pel luma units.
fx=(3&3)*2 = 6 in 1/8‑pel index; fy=((−5)&3)*2 = 2 (after modular handling). Use 8‑tap tables at frac 6 (x) and 2 (y).

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: CDEF constrain sample.

Input:
bit_depth=10; S=8; D=3; neighbor−center d=+20.
shift=max(0, D−⌊log2(S)⌋)=3−3=0; m=max(0, 20−(20>>0))=0 → res=0; high diff fully constrained at this S/D.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: Wiener normalization check.

Input:
Horizontal taps h=[a,b,c,d,e,g] with center fixed and symmetry (a=e, b=d). Sum must equal 1<<shift.
Verify a+b+center+b+a == 1<<shift (gain=1). If sum≠target, reject/clip per spec; decoder enforces before convolution.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: LR unit grid from code.

Input:
Plane Y, RU_size_code=64×64, frame 1920×1080.
Mi=4×4 units → frame in Mi: 480×270. RU in Mi: 16×16. Grid: ceil(480/16)=30 cols, ceil(270/16)=17 rows.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: tile layout (uniform).

Input:
tile_cols_log2=2, tile_rows_log2=1 on 1920×1080 with 128×128 SBs.
Cols=4, rows=2. SB grid: 15×9 (ceil). Column SB widths ~ ceil(15/4) with equalization; decoder computes exact column/row boundaries per spec rounding rules.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: coded_lossless detection per plane.

Input:
QIndex→dequant: Y: dc=0 ac=0; U: dc=0 ac=0; V: dc=2 ac=0; monochrome=0.
plane_lossless[Y]=1, [U]=1, [V]=0 → coded_lossless=0. If monochrome=1, only Y matters → coded_lossless=1.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: segmentation feature parse.

Input:
segmentation_enabled=1; segment 2 has QDELTA enabled with −12; base_q=144.
For blocks with seg_id=2, header‑scope qindex starts at clamp(144−12,0,MAXQ)=132 before any delta_q.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: frame_id wrap validation.

Input:
frame_id_length=15; delta_frame_id_length=7; prev_id=30000; current id read=200; ref id delta must be in (1..2^7).
diff=(200−30000) mod 2^15 = 200−(30000−32768)=1968; 1968 exceeds max delta (127) → error if used for ref matching.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: render vs frame size.

Input:
frame 1280×720; render_and_frame_size_different=1; render 1920×1080.
Decoder reconstructs 1280×720; post‑filters run at coded size; upscaling to 1920×1080 occurs at presentation (and/or via super‑res if signaled).

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: OBMC neighbor set.

Input:
Current block at (x,y) 32×32; above=inter, left=intra.
Eligible neighbors: above only (inter). Blend window along top edge applied; left excluded because not inter.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: chroma MV derivation (4:2:0).

Input:
Luma MV=(+5,+1) qpel; subsampling 4:2:0.
Scale to chroma grid → typically round to nearest 1/2 or 1/4 pel depending on chroma filter; offsets halved vs luma; sample with 4‑tap chroma filter; clamp at borders.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: EOB early exit.

Input:
TX 8×8 with EOB at position 12 per scan.
Decoder stops coefficient parsing after index 12; ITX only processes up to filled coefficients, improving speed.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: diff_mod helper.

Input:
bits=5, a=3, b=28.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: tile packet size bounds check.

Input:
tile_size_bytes says 12000; frame OBU payload remaining=11000.
Invalid: tile size exceeds payload bounds → stream error; decoder aborts frame.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: skip_mode_present derivation.

Input:
cur_oh=100; refs oh: {LAST=96, GOLDEN=110, ALT=80}.
There exists one past (96 or 80) and one future (110) within window; compound allowed → skip_mode_present=1.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: LR stripe overlap merge.

Input:
Adjacent RUs produce overlapping rows 4 px tall.
Decoder blends overlap with deterministic weights (e.g., top RU dominates top 2 rows, bottom RU the lower 2), preventing seams.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: global motion projective safe division.

Input:
denom=g*x+h*y+1<<FP; example x=1000,y=500,g=h=−2 in 16.16.
Compute denom in 64‑bit; if |denom| < epsilon (e.g., 1<<8) → reject model or clamp to identity to avoid overflow.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Worked: palette mode reconstruction (intra).

Input:
palette_size=4; entries={10,50,100,200}; index map for 4×4 given.
Decoder fills block by table lookup per index; no prediction filtering; apply bit‑depth clamp after write‑back.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Compute diff_mod for order hints.

Input:
bits=4; cur=9; ref=2. Return signed diff.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Derive coded width with super‑res.

Input:
input width=2560; scale numerator=7; denominator=8 (fixed).
coded_width = floor(2560*7/8)=2240.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Map QIndex 0 → dequant check.

Input:
Assume tables yield dc=0, ac=0 at QIndex=0. Is plane lossless?
Yes for that plane; coded_lossless requires all active planes lossless.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Tile columns (uniform).

Input:
tile_cols_log2=3; frame width in SBs=33.
cols=8; widths are nearly equal: either 4 or 5 SBs per column, summing to 33 as per spec equalization.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Edge eligibility for deblock.

Input:
Block boundary is intra vs inter? tx size large vs small?
Intra edges often use stronger thresholds; if tx size is large or skip set, eligibility/strength adjust per masks; if base level=0 → no filter.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Chroma sample clamp.

Input:
Sampling at x=−2 on 4:2:0 chroma plane width 640.
Clamp x to 0; use edge extension value for taps beyond border.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Distance‑weighted weight symmetry.

Input:
|d0|=3, |d1|=9 with table → w≈48.
Opposing weight is 16; check (w+(64−w))=64. Use out=(w*A+(64−w)*B+32)>>6.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

EOB group cutoff.

Input:
TX 16×16; EOB group indicates last coefficient < 64.
Decoder only parses up to index 63 in scan order; rest zeros.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

CDEF direction index count.

Input:
How many discrete directions are evaluated for 8×8?
A small finite set (e.g., 8 directions). Decoder picks max energy direction from this set.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

LR RU grid count.

Input:
Frame 1920×1080; RU 64×64.
Mi grid 480×270; RU Mi 16×16 → 30×17 units.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Projective warp denom sign.

Input:
If denom negative after fixed‑point calc, what then?
Signed division still valid; ensure no underflow and clip coords; reject if magnitude too small per spec.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Skip vs transform‑skip.

Input:
Block skip=1 vs txfm_skip=1 (small TX).
skip: no coeffs parsed → predictor only. txfm_skip: coeffs parsed but apply identity transform.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Monochrome header implications.

Input:
monochrome=1; how to parse chroma params?
Chroma quant/LF/CDEF/LR fields omitted or defaulted; only luma processed.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

Ref scaling with mixed widths.

Input:
Current coded width 1280; ref coded width 960.
Horizontal scale factor maps current x to ref x; use scaled strides and tap tables based on ref scale.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

OBMC window length on a 16×16 block.

Input:
What is the overlap extent?
A small border strip (e.g., 2–4 px) with pre‑tabulated weights along the shared edge.

You are an AV1 decoding-only assistant. Answer strictly about decoding (syntax parsing, reconstruction, in-loop filters, references). Do not give encoding advice. Prefer concise, spec-accurate explanations and deterministic pseudocode.

|d0|=4, |d1|=4 → symmetric; tables yield w=32. Blend is (32*A + 32*B + 32)>>6, i.e., rounded average; complementary weights sum to 64.

[Refs • primary_ref_frame] When does decoder seed probabilities from primary_ref_frame?
When error_resilient=0 and the chosen reference slot is valid. Otherwise, probabilities reset to frame defaults.

[State • Sequence] A: KEY oh=0 refresh all. B: INTER oh=3 refresh LAST,GOLDEN. C: show_existing_frame shows GOLDEN. D: INTER oh=5 refresh ALT. After D, what are oh values for LAST,GOLDEN,ALT?
After A: all=0. After B: LAST=3, GOLDEN=3. After C: unchanged. After D: ALT=5. Final: LAST=3, GOLDEN=3, ALT=5.

Yes. One past (48 or 40) and one future (54) exist; if compound is allowed, skip_mode_present=1.

[Tiles • Cross-border MC] Can MC read pixels from an adjacent tile?
No. Tile independence forbids cross-tile reads; implement with per-tile padding/clamping to satisfy filter radii within the tile.

[Tiles • Super-res interaction] Does super-res change tile layout?
No. Tile layout is defined in coded (pre-upscale) resolution. Super-res applies after in-loop filters on the reconstructed coded frame.

[DPB • Film grain] If film grain is applied at output, what is stored in DPB?
The pre-grain, post-LR reconstructed frame. Grain is never stored or referenced.

[Refs • Frame ID matching] frame_id_numbers_present=1. How does decoder use frame_id?
It validates reference identity/wrap constraints (via delta_frame_id length) and can match a DPB entry even with reordering; illegal deltas cause a resilience error.

[Refs • Global motion availability] If header signals no global motion for a ref, can a block use warpmv with that ref?
No. warpmv requires a valid per-ref global motion model; without it, the motion mode is not available for that reference.

[Refs • Chroma precision] How are chroma MVs derived and clamped when ref is scaled?
Scale luma MV into ref’s coded space, convert to chroma grid with subsampling, apply chroma fractional precision rules, then clamp sampling coords within the ref tile’s padded bounds.

[Tiles • Prob copy ordering] If context_update_tile_id=2 in a 4×4 tile grid, which tiles must decode before copying?
Tile (row=0..3,col=2) (the source) must be decoded first to produce prob tables; any tile configured to copy from it can decode afterward using that snapshot.

Reject: surfaces and pipeline are allocated per sequence bit depth; a conflicting frame bit depth is invalid.

[Refs • Distance weight asymmetry] cur=100; ref0=95; ref1=80. Which ref receives higher weight?
ref0 (95) is closer (|d0|=5 vs |d1|=20), so its weight w>32 and ref1’s is 64−w < 32; exact values from the distance-weight table.

[Tiles • LR/CDEF across tile borders] Can CDEF/LR read across tiles?
No. Implementations must confine reads within the tile (with local padding/overlap as allowed). Cross-tile reads violate independence.

[DPB • show_existing then refresh] A frame uses show_existing_frame=1 and also sets refresh_frame_flags!=0. Is that legal?
Generally disallowed; show_existing usually forbids refresh. If the stream sets both, treat as invalid unless a specific exception is signaled by the profile (rare).

[Refs • Illegal future reference] seq.bits=3; cur=1; ref candidates: 2, 6. Which are legal?
diff_mod(3,2,1)=+1 (legal past). diff_mod(3,6,1)=(6−1)&7=5 → sign-extended negative → illegal future. Only 2 is legal.

[Tiles • Memory planning] What per-tile buffers does a decoder typically need?
Entropy state, block mode-info cache, dequant/tx state for current SBs, a local border/padding area for MC and filters, and a scratch for post-filters per SB row to preserve independence.

[DPB • Reference scaling cache] What can be cached per ref to accelerate MC?
Scaled strides, precomputed address transforms, phase-to-coeff lookup tables for the current scale, and clamped edge indices for common neighborhoods.
